articles.title: His brother passed away from glioblastoma. He’s running Boston for cancer research
articles.description:
"The grant will support researchers at Massachusetts General Hospital who study how glioblastoma evolves."

The post His brother passed away from glioblastoma. He’s running Boston for cancer research appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Colin Gerner is running the Boston Marathon to honor his brother who died from glioblastoma.
Funds raised will support glioblastoma research at Massachusetts General Hospital.
The initiative aims to improve treatment options for Boston residents affected by this aggressive cancer.
